sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89675" key="pro/skunes" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρόσκῠνες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n89675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πρόκυνες</ref></xr>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Προκύων</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
